title: cajanus volubilis var. burmanicus
intro: Cajanus volubilis var. burmanicus, also known as the Burmese bean or Indian cluster bean, is a variety of the Cajanus volubilis plant, a member of the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Cajanus volubilis var. burmanicus include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used in herbal teas and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
